subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of the Sovereign of Being, that Promised Beauty and Praiseworthy Countenance, in the Pole of Existence through the grace of Witnessing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت سلطان وجود آن جمال موعود و طلعت محمود در قطب وجود بفیض شهود
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God as sun, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
